title: Protocol fallback dispatcher: shared decision tree for Chat→Responses API
description: Implement shared fallback dispatcher per protocol decision tree: is_format_mismatch -> send_chat_via_shared_fallback, is_responses_api_required -> copilot/generic responses path.
close_reason: Already fully implemented. is_format_mismatch, is_responses_api_required, send_chat_via_shared_fallback, send_copilot_responses_request, and route persistence all exist in chat.rs with tests. No new code needed.

title: feat(fallback): virtual models with ordered provider:model pairs
description: Add fallback mechanism: virtual model names backed by ordered provider:model pairs, tried in sequence with exclusion tracking and expiry. CLI: create, list, get, update, delete, status, clear-exclusions, reorder. Non-zero exit = transient exclusion (30s). Launch error = transient exclusion (60s). Same-key context, model changes per entry.
close_reason: Implemented: data model, CLI CRUD, fallback routing in run command, exclusion tracking with expiry, naming constraints, persistence. All 2914 tests pass, clippy clean.

title: Debug log: capture fallback transitions in JSONL output
description: Ensure --debug JSONL logger captures provider-switch and fallback-transition events. Required fields: request metadata, response status, routing decision, fallback transition.
close_reason: Added RouteEvent phase to HttpDebugLogger with log_route_event() helper. Wired into serve_router's protocol auto-switch and failover paths. Router_selection test flakiness pre-existing (passes in isolation).

title: Plugin runtime dependency validation
description: Plugin validates its required binary at invocation time. Missing binary yields clear actionable error message. No silent failures.
close_reason: Added check_plugin_binary() pre-flight validation and improved spawn error messages with actionable hints. 4 new tests. 2912 tests pass.

title: Binary download: R2 mirror fallback for GitHub failures
description: When GitHub download fails (timeout/network error), fall back to Cloudflare R2 mirror. Deduplicate fallback messages per attempt.
close_reason: Added GitHub→R2 mirror fallback in materialize_github(): when primary download fails, retry via AIVO_GH_MIRROR env var. Fallback message prints once per attempt. 2 unit tests added. 2908 tests pass.

title: First-run starter key: skip model picker when only aivo-starter key exists
description: When exactly one API key exists (aivo-starter), skip model picker and auto-use aivo/starter model. Deactivate once any user-added key is present.
close_reason: Implemented first-run starter key bypass in start.rs: is_first_run_with_starter() detects single-key aivo-starter state and injects AIVO_STARTER_MODEL, skipping model picker. 4 unit tests added. 2906+ tests pass.

title: feat(fallback): orphan entry cleanup on key deletion + provider validation
description: Add cleanup of orphan fallback entries when API keys are deleted. Provider matching uses known_providers for exact match, falls back to substring matching on key name/base_url. Warns on fallback create/update when a provider has no matching key. Files: session_store.rs, keys.rs, fallback.rs
